$meta.description: Automatically extracted from theme.css via Style Settings metadata

Disable Opacity Reduction in Dark Mode: Disable Opacity Reduction in Dark Mode
Not fully test. Feel free to report bugs: Not fully test. Feel free to report bugs

Background color in secondary area, e.g. sidebar

Increase the brightness of background co: Increase the brightness of background color
Styles maybe broken when using stacked t: Styles maybe broken when using stacked tabs
\"gradient\" is ineffective when the col: "gradient" is ineffective when the color scheme is "Minimal"
Applies to menus, modals, popups, and gr: Applies to menus, modals, popups, and graph control panels. Disable if scrolling becomes laggy. Not available on mobile devices.
Please turn off this option when using t: Please turn off this option when using third-party icon plugins to avoid conflicts.
Enable Logseq Bullet Thread Style of out: Enable Logseq Bullet Thread Style of outline
Reload Obsidian after enabling this feat: Reload Obsidian after enabling this feature. Reference from https://github.com/pengx17/logseq-dev-theme/blob/main/bullet_threading.css
Similar to VSCode document search widget: Similar to VSCode document search widget
Works best with the \"Setting Search\" p: Works best with the "Setting Search" plugin; not valid on mobile
Center the Setting Panel Header Title: Center the Setting Panel Header Title
Move Some Search Bar to Modal Header: Move Some Search Bar to Modal Header
Add Icons For Left Navigation Group Titl: Add Icons For Left Navigation Group Title
Enable Modal Open Animation Optimization: Enable Modal Open Animation Optimization for Low-Performance Devices
❗ May cause font blurriness when APP sca: ❗ May cause font blurriness when APP scaling is not set to 100%
\"Thin\" and \"Floating\" will fallback: "Thin" and "Floating" will fallback to "Default" on mobile
❗Turning on will prevent some panels upd: ❗Turning on will prevent some panels updating instantly while switching tabs
When To Show Close Button On Tabs: When To Show Close Button On Tabs
Font Size of File Name On Tab Title Bar: Font Size of File Name On Tab Title Bar
Note: The \"Auto scroll in\" option is o: Note: The "Auto scroll in" option is only effective when "Enable Floating Style" is on
Styled scrollbar, auto hide when mouse i: Styled scrollbar, auto hide when mouse is out of the container
❗ This can cause severe lag when typing: ❗ This can cause severe lag when typing on some old computers or mobile devices
Grid Line Color for Editor Background: Grid Line Color for Editor Background
Indent all paragraphs if \"p-indent\" ex: Indent all paragraphs if "p-indent" exists in properties.cssclasses
Any CSS \"width\" value, e.g. clamp(MinW: Any CSS "width" value, e.g. clamp(MinWidth, WidthPercent, MaxWidth)
If using \"Maple Mono\" as monospace fon: If using "Maple Mono" as monospace font, recommend setting to 'calt','cv01','cv02' to bring back normal glyphs
Use Text Font in Non-formula Parts of La: Use Text Font in Non-formula Parts of LaTeX
No effective on Latin letters and number: No effective on Latin letters and numbers
❗The icon will be duplicated if the link: ❗The icon will be duplicated if the link text contains space or extra styles
Keep link color consistent with heading,: Keep link color consistent with heading, but retain icon
Click to Edit Link in Live Preview Mode: Click to Edit Link in Live Preview Mode
❗Disables hover animation; external link: ❗Disables hover animation; external link prefix icon will be disabled
Heading: Heading

Visible on hover; disabled when alias is: Visible on hover; disabled when alias is "#", e.g., ![[FileName|#]]

Enable Quote Mark Style in Reading View: Enable Quote Mark Style in Reading View
Replace front line border with a quotati: Replace front line border with a quotation mark
❗No support for list or task items insid: ❗No support for list or task items inside callouts
Only support bullet list in Live Preview: Only support bullet list in Live Preview mode. Reference from https://gist.github.com/KillyMXI/cbef8edff6dd55d9e6ea4df66567e9b1
Disable this if you are using your own i: Disable this if you are using your own implementation via a CSS snippet
Enable Code Block Line Numbers in Live P: Enable Code Block Line Numbers in Live Preview Mode
Due to the limitation of Obsidian's rend: Due to the limitation of Obsidian's render strategy, if the code block has too many lines, line numbering may be incorrect
Enable Code Block Language Indicator in: Enable Code Block Language Indicator in Reading View

Tags like \"#obsidian\", \"#todo\", \"#i: Tags like "#obsidian", "#todo", "#important", "#progress", and "#complete" will be colorized when using "Outline" or "Fill" styles
Center Text in Card When Focus is Lost: Center Text in Card When Focus is Lost

It is inconvenient to install fonts on m: It is inconvenient to install fonts on mobile devices, so maybe you need this option
> [!tip]\n> 1. Reset options in **Appear:
> [!tip]
> 1. Reset options in **Appearance > Font** to make this work
> 2. Type "**maplemono**" if you want to use the theme's built-in monospace font Maple Mono
> 3. External font can load from CSS Snippets.
